steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The underlined portion follows "thus" and describes Oliveira's approach: capitalizing on research potential from a vast but underutilized source. The question asks what function this sentence serves in the passage.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — specifies applications of the method: The passage mentions research potential, not specific applications of the technique. ✗
  • Choice B — evaluates the significance of Oliveira's approach: The phrase "capitalizing on the research potential" is evaluative commentary on the approach itself — it assesses what makes the method noteworthy. ✓
  • Choice C — emphasizes what the method discovered: The passage only mentions potential, not findings or discoveries. ✗
  • Choice D — explains why the method went underutilized: The passage notes the underutilization as a fact; it does not explain the cause. ✗
That matches choice B — B is correct.
